calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, Bailiff: R. Guitron.
Petitioner: Michael Jay Resnick, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Shelly Jay Resnick.
Decree signed in open court.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Apr-08-2008 Off Calendar
